title: Data Analyst/Scientist
description: Built and maintained a production-grade time-series forecasting system processing 2.8M+ observations, achieving a 7.3% RMSE improvement over seasonal naive baseline through systematic model evaluation and optimisation. Developed robust data pipelines to collect, clean, and combine internal sensor data with external weather information, using vectorized synchronisation algorithms to handle asynchronous multi-source data streams. Performed advanced feature engineering using MSTL seasonal decomposition and K-Means clustering to identify behavioural patterns and segment heterogeneous usage profiles. Benchmarked multiple ML models (Prophet, LightGBM, LSTM, TCN) using MLflow experiment tracking with 5-fold cross-validation. Designed Tableau dashboards and delivered data-driven recommendations through stakeholder presentations.
achievements: Built production-grade forecasting system processing 2.8M+ observations
Achieved 7.3% RMSE improvement over seasonal naive baseline
Benchmarked Prophet, LightGBM, LSTM, TCN with MLflow and 5-fold CV
Designed Tableau dashboards translating model outputs into business insights

title: Predictive Modelling with Automated MLOps Workflow
description: Engineered a preprocessing pipeline with cyclic encoding, quantile binning, and log-scaling; reduced 12 input features to 6 through correlation analysis and data leakage detection. Benchmarked 4 regression models using MLflow experiment tracking and 5-fold cross-validation with RandomizedSearchCV; improved R² from 0.608 (linear baseline) to 0.808 (LightGBM), selecting LightGBM for 24x faster inference and 180x smaller memory usage over Random Forest. Deployed model as a real-time REST API using FastAPI with Pydantic input validation, containerised with Docker. Designed an Apache Airflow DAG for scheduled monthly retraining with champion-challenger evaluation.
achievements: Improved R² from 0.608 to 0.808 with LightGBM
Achieved 24x faster inference and 180x smaller memory vs Random Forest
Deployed real-time REST API with FastAPI and Docker
Designed Airflow DAG for automated monthly retraining

title: Deep Learning Pipeline for Time-Series Imputation
description: Engineered a modular deep learning pipeline using PyTorch Lightning to recover missing measurements in multi-decade time-series datasets, implementing LSTM architecture optimised for temporal pattern reconstruction. Built automated data preprocessing pipeline handling large-scale datasets stored in AWS S3, addressing data quality issues including missing values, outliers, and temporal inconsistencies across 8 variables. Integrated Weights & Biases for real-time training monitoring and GPU utilisation tracking; applied Bayesian hyperparameter optimisation achieving 16.8% reduced validation loss. Conducted comprehensive EDA using Matplotlib to identify seasonal trends, correlations, and anomalies.
achievements: Achieved 16.8% reduced validation loss via Bayesian hyperparameter optimisation
Built automated preprocessing pipeline for multi-decade time-series on AWS S3
Integrated W&B for real-time training monitoring and GPU tracking

title: Coffee Shop Sales Analytics Project
description: Conducted end-to-end analysis of 149K+ transactions across 3 NYC locations using Python; built row-, order-, and daily-level data models covering 15+ analytical dimensions. Identified 127% order growth and 140% revenue growth trajectory through time-series analysis, distinguishing 3 business phases. Applied Pareto analysis revealing Top 25 SKUs driving 80% of revenue; recommended pricing strategy leveraging Ultra tier ($10+) delivering 6x revenue leverage from only 1.3% volume share. Utilised Z-score normalisation to compare hourly patterns across stores, differentiating demand models to inform staffing optimisation. Delivered 8 actionable business recommendations.
achievements: Analyzed 149K+ transactions across 3 NYC locations
Identified 127% order growth and 140% revenue growth trajectory
Applied Pareto analysis: Top 25 SKUs driving 80% of revenue
Delivered 8 actionable business recommendations

title: Campus Analytics Platform
description: Led A/B testing programme with rigorous experimental design across 3 experiments over 4 weeks; applied t-tests and chi-square tests to validate statistical significance, achieving an 18.6% increase in student engagement. Developed SQL-based analytics system tracking 1,300+ weekly user interactions across 6 campus services; leveraged advanced queries for cohort analysis, funnel analysis, and retention analysis to identify usage bottlenecks. Designed interactive Tableau dashboards for real-time monitoring of engagement metrics and resource utilisation; deployed platform on Azure with automated data refresh pipelines via GitHub Actions.
achievements: Achieved 18.6% increase in student engagement via A/B testing
Tracked 1,300+ weekly user interactions across 6 campus services
Deployed platform on Azure with automated GitHub Actions pipelines

title: Interview Tutor
description: Mentored undergraduate students applying to competitive postgraduate programmes including Imperial College London's MSc Applied Computational Science and Engineering, drawing on first-hand experience of the application and interview process. Conducted structured mock interviews covering technical reasoning, mathematical foundations, and motivation questions, providing detailed feedback to improve students' confidence and performance. Identified individual knowledge gaps and designed targeted preparation materials tailored to each student's academic background and target programme requirements.
achievements: Mentored students applying to Imperial College MSc programmes
Conducted structured mock interviews with personalised feedback
Designed targeted preparation materials for individual knowledge gaps

title: Teaching Assistant
description: Supported 60+ students across three courses: Data Structures & Algorithms, Information Retrieval, and Intro to Programming, providing one-on-one guidance during weekly lab sessions. Explained complex programming concepts in C and Java including recursion, sorting algorithms, tree structures, and object-oriented design, adapting explanations to different learning styles. Identified recurring student misconceptions and developed targeted worked examples and analogies to address common sticking points. Collaborated closely with professors to align lab content with lecture material.
achievements: Supported 60+ students across 3 courses
Taught C and Java covering recursion, sorting, trees, and OOP
Developed targeted examples addressing recurring misconceptions

title: Deep Learning Model Development for Image Restoration
description: Designed and implemented a deep learning solution for automated medical image restoration using U-Net architecture in PyTorch. Engineered an encoder-decoder architecture with 4 downsampling/upsampling layers and skip connections, processing 512x512 medical images while preserving fine-grained spatial information. Generated synthetic training datasets using diffusion models (DDIM) to address limited training data availability. Developed custom loss function combining MSE and SSIM for structural coherence, achieving convergence within 30 epochs. Benchmarked U-Net, VAE, and GAN architectures, with U-Net achieving 40% faster training and more stable convergence.
achievements: Built U-Net achieving 40% faster training than VAE and GAN alternatives
Generated synthetic training data using diffusion models (DDIM)
Developed custom MSE+SSIM loss function converging within 30 epochs
Benchmarked U-Net, VAE, and GAN across multiple performance metrics

title: Student Representative
description: Represented 60+ students by collecting feedback and raising key concerns during biweekly staff meetings; successfully managed stakeholder relationships and improved hybrid teaching experiences. Organized cross-departmental events, coordinating with internal college staff and external vendors to deliver inclusive catering and engaging activities. Collaborated with other representatives and scheduled the Professional Journey Talk series, inviting faculty to share career insights and inspire students' career planning.
achievements: Represented 60+ students in biweekly staff meetings
Organised cross-departmental events with internal and external coordination
Scheduled Professional Journey Talk series with faculty speakers

title: Project Leader (Project Manager)
description: Led team of 7 to solve graph-based optimization problem using genetic algorithms for mineral separation circuit configuration; structured project into development, integration, and documentation phases to ensure timely delivery. Decomposed complex problem into modular components (GA core, recovery scoring, circuit simulator) and delegated tasks based on team strengths; conducted daily stand-ups to maintain alignment and resolve blockers. Delivered final presentation that received top peer review scores for algorithm design and code clarity.
achievements: Led team of 7 delivering graph-based optimisation project
Received top peer review scores for algorithm design and code clarity
Structured project into development, integration, and documentation phases

title: Cafe Staff Member
description: Processed customer orders efficiently using digital menu system, handling cash and card payments with accuracy during busy service periods. Prepared quality coffee, chai, panini, and patharas following recipes and presentation standards. Maintained strict hygiene standards with Level 2 Food Hygiene and Allergen Training certifications. Assisted with daily stock replenishment, monitoring inventory levels, and organizing storage areas. Balanced multiple responsibilities simultaneously while maintaining friendly customer service.
achievements: Maintained strict food safety compliance with Level 2 certification
Managed multiple responsibilities: orders, drinks, food, and payments simultaneously
Assisted with daily stock replenishment and inventory monitoring

title: Retail Assistant
description: Served 100+ customers daily during peak summer season, processing transactions quickly to minimize queue times. Operated POS system confidently for cash, card, and mobile payments with 100% accuracy. Replenished shelves, unpacked deliveries, and ensured checkout area cleanliness. Resolved customer queries and complaints politely, maintaining a positive store reputation.
achievements: Served 100+ customers daily during peak summer season
Achieved 100% payment accuracy across cash, card, and mobile
Maintained clean and organised checkout area

title: Information Retrieval Search Engine
description: Designed and implemented a BM25-based document search engine in Python, supporting both a small corpus (1,400 documents) and a large web-crawled corpus with recursive directory traversal. Built a complete text processing pipeline including regex-based tokenisation, stopword removal, and Porter Stemmer normalisation with a stemming cache. Computed and persisted inverted index term weights to disk, enabling fast index loading for subsequent queries. Developed adaptive retrieval strategy using score-threshold filter with 70% cutoff, tuned to balance precision and recall. Implemented full evaluation framework computing six standard IR metrics: Precision, Recall, P@10, R-Precision, MAP, and bpref.
achievements: Built BM25 search engine supporting small and large corpora
Implemented 6 standard IR evaluation metrics (Precision, Recall, P@10, R-Precision, MAP, bpref)
Developed adaptive retrieval with score-threshold filtering
